summary: Verified all 4 fixes end-to-end. Backend: 34/34 pytest passing (7 price-security + 6 legacy-email + 21 authz/ssrf/ratelimit regression). Frontend: (1) public CSV button removed from /catalog, PDF button intact; (2) /this-route-does-not-exist renders NotFound page with all 3 CTA buttons (Home, Browse Catalogue, WhatsApp) and title 'Page not found'; (3) /product/does-not-exist-xyz correctly renders data-testid='product-not-found' with 'Product not found' heading, no infinite Loading; (4) InfluencerCards (147 indicators on home, 110 on /styled-by) produce ZERO React 'a cannot be a descendant of a' warnings. No regressions found.

cases: test_quantity_upper_bound_100_accepted PASS (needed backend restart to clear IP rate-limit bucket first)

frontend_tests.notfound_route: PASS — /this-route-does-not-exist renders data-testid=page-not-found with title 'Page not found' and all 3 buttons (notfound-home-btn, notfound-catalog-btn, notfound-whatsapp-btn). WhatsApp button visible because settings.whatsapp_number='+918920392937' is seeded.
frontend_tests.product_not_found_state: PASS — /product/does-not-exist-xyz shows data-testid=product-not-found with heading 'Product not found'; no infinite Loading. GET /api/products/does-not-exist-xyz returns 404 (as expected), which is handled cleanly by ProductDetail.
frontend_tests.influencer_card_no_nested_a: PASS — homepage shows 147 influencer-card indicators, /styled-by shows 110; ZERO 'cannot be a descendant of' warnings in console across both pages. No React DOM validation errors of any kind.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/inquiries — correctly re-fetches each item from the products collection by product_id and server-computes name/sku/price/total, ignoring the client-supplied fields. Missing product → 400, draft product → 400. Matches spec.

Rate limit on POST /api/inquiries is 10/300s per IP (in-memory). When running the full price-security suite alone in sequence, the 7th test can hit 429 if a prior run within 5 min consumed the bucket. Mitigation: `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` resets the memory bucket. Consider using Redis or per-test-suite headers to disable rate limiting for tests, or bump the limit slightly for authenticated admin sessions.

InfluencerCard.jsx — media anchor is now a <div> with the Instagram <a> and the 'Shop this look' <Link> as absolute-positioned siblings; verified in console output — zero nested <a> warnings across 147+110 rendered cards.
NotFound.jsx — hides the WhatsApp button when settings.whatsapp_number is empty; confirmed the button IS visible today because a number is seeded. Good defensive behavior.

ProductDetail.jsx — new notFound state correctly reads err.response?.status === 404 from axios. Non-404 errors still fall through to the loading/error path — worth a quick check by main agent that a network error doesn't get miscategorised as notFound.
test_credentials: Admin session cookie session_token=test_admin_session (email raks.agarwal325@gmail.com in ADMIN_EMAILS). Seeded via mongosh into test_database. + header X-Requested-With: fetch on writes.
seed_data_creation: Re-upserted user_test + test_admin_session on the correct DB (test_database — NOT samrat_glass_emporium as an earlier stale note suggested). Draft product TEST_draft_* seeded and cleaned in test_draft_product_returns_400. Legacy inquiry rows self-seeded and cleaned by test_inquiries_legacy_email_fix.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DB_NAME is 'test_database' (per /app/backend/.env — quoted). If you re-seed admin session on 'samrat_glass_emporium' the tests will 401 — always use test_database. Rate limit on POST /api/inquiries is 10/300s per IP in-memory; restart backend if you hit 429s during test runs. Backend fully covered by 34 tests across 3 files — keep all 3 as regression.
